---
title: "demo cheatsheet"
subtitle: "ggsql + dbt · posit hackathon 2026"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc-title: "steps"
    toc-depth: 2
    embed-resources: true
    css: posit.css
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .artifact    { background: #DEF1EB; border-left: 3px solid #0A9396;
                 padding: 0.5em 0.8em; border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0;
                 font-size: 0.9em; color: #005F73; margin-top: 0.5em; }
  .dir-badge   { background: #001219; color: #94D2BD; font-family: monospace;
                 font-size: 0.8em; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px;
                 display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 0.6em; }
  .reset-block { background: #FFF3F0; border-left: 3px solid #FF694B;
                 padding: 0.5em 0.8em; border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0; margin-top: 0.5em; }
  .tab-label   { background: #447099; color: white; font-size: 0.75em;
                 font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 4px;
                 display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 0.4em; }
  h2 { border-bottom: 1px solid #DEF1EB; padding-bottom: 0.3em; }
</style>
```

## before you start

Open **two terminal tabs** and leave them open for the whole demo.

<div class="tab-label">TAB 1 — original project</div>

```bash
cd ~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo
```

<div class="tab-label">TAB 2 — modified dbt</div>

```bash
cd ~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo-modifieddbt/nba_dbt
```

Then launch the slides:

```bash
open demo_intro.html
```

---

## slides 1–5

**the problem · the idea · why now? · how it works · same sql. no bi tool.**

No commands. Talk through the deck.

---

## option a · ggsql cli

<div class="tab-label">TAB 1</div>
<div class="dir-badge">~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo</div>

```bash
OUTPUT=cli make
```

<div class="artifact">
  → <strong>11 chart HTML files</strong> appear in <code>output/charts/</code>
</div>

```bash
open output/charts/shot_chart_knicks_cavs.html
```

---

## option b · static bundle

<div class="tab-label">TAB 1</div>
<div class="dir-badge">~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo</div>

```bash
OUTPUT=static make
```

<div class="artifact">
  → <code>output/static/index.html</code> assembled — grid of links, no runtime
</div>

```bash
open output/static/index.html
```

---

## option c · full report

<div class="tab-label">TAB 1</div>
<div class="dir-badge">~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo</div>

```bash
make
```

<div class="artifact">
  → <code>nba_report.html</code> — narrative + TOC + 17 charts
</div>

```bash
open nba_report.html
```

---

## hooks are nice, built-in would be better

<div class="tab-label">TAB 2</div>
<div class="dir-badge">~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo-modifieddbt/nba_dbt</div>

```bash
uv run dbt ls --profiles-dir . --project-dir . --resource-type visualization
```

Point at: **`nba_finals.visualization.shot_chart_knicks_cavs`**

---

## visualization as a native dbt node

<div class="tab-label">TAB 2</div>
<div class="dir-badge">~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo-modifieddbt/nba_dbt</div>

```bash
uv run dbt build --profiles-dir . --project-dir . --select shot_chart_knicks_cavs
```

Point at the build line:

> `Finished running 1 project hook, 1 visualization in 0.42s`

<div class="artifact">
  → <code>output/charts/shot_chart_knicks_cavs.html</code> — built by dbt as a native node type
</div>

```bash
open output/charts/shot_chart_knicks_cavs.html
```

---

## what could be next · thanks

No commands. Close on the deck.

---

## reset

<div class="dir-badge">any tab</div>

```bash
rm -f ~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo/output/charts/*.html
rm -rf ~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo/output/static
rm -f ~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo/nba_report.html
rm -f ~/Desktop/Projects/dbtggsql-demo-modifieddbt/nba_dbt/output/charts/*.html
```

<div class="reset-block">
  <strong>After reset:</strong> <code>output/charts/</code> dirs exist but are empty. All output HTML files are gone. <code>make</code> rebuilds everything from scratch.
</div>
